title: polyscias dioica
intro: Polyscias dioica, also known as the Cabbage Palm or Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. Native to tropical Africa, it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The leaves of the Polyscias dioica plant are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote overall health. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of teas or infusions, can be used to treat a range of health issues, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
